## Source: amazon-inspector (34866a6d91e495c7692a123d4f1b31f1a98cf793744c4649f92eccf97d43ee9b)
The package promanage was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (7630230583f088dfe44eb1a957399e34ac8f53a8b96d663a5e8c65cea0b81bdb)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'promanage' @ 6.0.21 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
